userStories.title: Establish Baseline & Analyze Metrics
userStories.description: Run the platform grader benchmark (benchmark/run_platform_grader.py) to get initial metrics. Analyze the `benchmark/reports/final_platform_grade.json` to identify bottlenecks in speed, accuracy, or efficiency.
acceptanceCriteria: Benchmark run completes successfully without errors.
Current F1, Throughput, and Cost metrics are logged.

userStories.title: Deep Optimization Loop (Recall & Throughput)
userStories.description: The current Recall is ~50% and Throughput is ~1.2 msg/sec. We need >95% Recall and >5 msg/sec. This task involves a deep loop of: 1) Analyzing misses in `final_platform_grade.json`. 2) Tuning `src/prompts/core.py` and regex in `src/rule_based_extractor.py` to catch missed picks. 3) Tuning `src/parallel_batch_processor.py` batch sizes for higher throughput.

userStories.title: Final Polish & Verification
userStories.description: Run the full benchmark suite one last time. Ensure all metrics meet the target goals. Clean up any debug logging.
acceptanceCriteria: Codebase is clean and strictly typed.
